name: Application Crashes
description: Detects application crashes, hangs, and Windows Error Reporting events. Useful in DFIR for identifying exploit attempts (crashes from injected shellcode), malware that crashed during execution, or repeated crashes indicating instability after an attack.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.1000: Application Error — FaultingApplicationName, FaultingModuleName, ExceptionCode (0xc0000005=access violation, 0xc000001d=illegal instruction), Offset
event_descriptions.1001: Windows Error Reporting — BucketId, EventName, links crash to WER fault bucket
event_descriptions.1002: Application Hang — FaultingApplicationName, HangType (deadlock, UI freeze)
event_descriptions.1008: WER: Application error reporting was disabled
event_descriptions.1026: .NET Runtime error — Application, Description (full .NET exception with stack trace)
